description: Prateek's canonical Xcode / iOS runtime / device triple for new iOS projects. Pinned to match what GitHub Actions macos-15 and macos-26 runner images ship out of the box, so local dev and CI use the same runtime without a download step. Read by ios-project-scaffold and ios.md. Update on quarterly review.

rationale.xcode: Latest stable Xcode 26 point release. Both macos-15 and macos-26 GHA images bundle 26.3.
rationale.runtime: iOS 26.2 is the most-recent iOS 26 runtime pre-installed on GHA macos-15 and macos-26 runner images, so pinning here avoids an Apple-ID runtime download step in CI. Local dev should install iOS 26.2 if not already present: `xcodes runtimes install "iOS 26.2"`.
rationale.devices: Current-year flagship phone and tablet, both present in Xcode 26.3 device-type registry.
